settings.title: I've tried products that never worked together.

Oil & Congestion
settings.text: Excess oil can mix with dead skin cells.

settings.title: Blocked Pores
settings.text: When pores become congested, breakouts become more noticeable.

settings.title: Inflammation
settings.text: Using harsh products too often leaves skin feeling stressed.

settings.title: Start with a clean foundation.
settings.product_name: Deep Cleansing Face Wash for Acne Control
settings.text: Removes excess oil, impurities and prepares your skin for the rest of the routine.

settings.title: Support a balanced complexion.
settings.text: Hydrates and strengthens your skin barrier without clogging pores.

settings.title: Protect your skin daily.
settings.text: Broad-spectrum SPF 50 PA++++ protection with a lightweight finish suitable for everyday wear.
Routine begins supporting a calmer-looking complexion.*

settings.question: Can beginners use this routine?
settings.answer: Yes, we've designed this exactly for beginners. No complicated layering required.

settings.question: Can oily skin use these products?
settings.answer: Absolutely. They are formulated to be lightweight and non-comedogenic.

settings.question: When should I expect visible changes?
settings.answer: While some feel fresher in week one, consistency over 6-8 weeks is key for visible calm.

settings.question: Should I use every step?
settings.answer: We highly recommend following the complete routine for the best supportive results.

settings.question: Can I combine this with other products?
settings.answer: We suggest using only this routine for the first month to let your skin adjust properly.

settings.hero_heading: A simpler routine for calmer, healthier-looking skin.
settings.hero_body:
Acne can make skincare feel overwhelming.

You don't need to understand every ingredient.

Just start with a routine designed around your concern.
settings.understand_heading:
Acne isn't just about your skin.
It's about confidence too.
settings.why_bottom: A consistent routine helps support skin that feels cleaner, calmer and healthier over time.
settings.routine_headline:
Designed around your concern.
Not around ingredients.
settings.routine_subheading:
Everything below has one purpose:
supporting acne-prone skin with a simple daily routine.
settings.final_heading: Healthy-looking skin starts with one simple decision.
settings.final_body:
Stop researching products.
Start following a routine built around your skin.
